news.headline: Norman Powell scores 18, Heat use balanced attack to down Cavs 120-103 and snap 5-game skid

news.headline: Wembanyama scores 26, red-hot Spurs roll past sliding Heat 136-111 and clinch Southwest Division
news.description: — Victor Wembanyama finished with 26 points, 15 rebounds and five blocked shots, and the San Antonio Spurs rolled past the sliding Miami Heat 136-111 on Monday night for their sixth consecutive victory.
